message:
chore(tests): expand single-line imports to one-per-line and remove unused imports

Refactor all ~87 test_check_*.py files to use individual import statements
instead of single-line multi-import syntax (import importlib, json, os, sys).
Remove unused imports (tempfile, extra modules) across the test suite.
Update test_fixture_runner.py with consistent import formatting.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
